results.title: Trump Loses Bid to Cancel Grants Retroactively
results.description: “A federal judge declared Friday that the Trump administration can’t cancel grants based on new rules or goals established after the fact — in a blow to its efforts to terminate billions of dollars already promised,” Politico reports.

results.title: 'People will die': Healthcare debate dominates Woerner town hall
results.description: At the event, Assemblywoman Carrie Woerner debated a handful of activists who expressed support for the New York Health Act.

results.title: Front page photo sent wrong message
results.description: I was disappointed to see an imposing three-column photo that featured state representative candidate Travis Smith on the front-page of Wednesday's edition of the Quill. Giving that kind of free publicity to a political candidate is unethical.

results.title: GRAND TRAVERSE What's on Aug. 4 ballot?
results.description: In the Aug. 4 election, Grand Traverse County voters are considering proposals in four townships and five school districts.

results.title: Weed-filled neighboring lot puts thorn in side of Grand Island business owner
results.description: Patrick Buettner called the Police Department’s Code Enforcement Division, which deals with city code violations such as overgrown lawns and overparked cars. Resolution isn't quick and isn't perfect.
